input.instruction: A weakener fired on a credibility evidence package. Using ONLY the supplied pattern definition and measures, explain what the flag means, why it fired, and what the engineer should do. Choose ONE action_class from the §5B vocabulary, report a verbalized confidence, and escalate if uncertain. Stay within measure-don't-judge: report on the evidence package, never on whether the model is correct.

fired_pattern.definition: Data-processing procedure undocumented and outcome-determining: an undocumented transformation materially shapes what the surrogate can represent.
fired_pattern.standard_anchor: ASME V&V 40 data-processing documentation; proto-taxonomy D-CCB-11

measures.target_preprocessing: clipped at 95th percentile (found in code, undocumented in package)

case_context.cou: surrogate screens extreme-load contingencies for a grid-reliability decision

answer_key.gold_mechanism: An undocumented 95th-percentile clip on the training targets censors exactly the extreme-load regime the COU depends on; the low validation error is computed on the censored distribution and does not characterize the decision regime.

gold_action.posture_basis: standard-derived (ASME V&V 40: credibility bounded to the validated domain)

parameters.scope: document the clipping + characterize the extreme-load regime

forbidden_claims: asserts the surrogate is wrong on extremes (a verdict the processing gap does not establish)
treats the low error on the censored data as evidence for the extreme regime

hardness.obvious_signal: validation error on the processed dataset is very low (0.6%)
hardness.conflicting_signal: the training targets were silently clipped at the 95th percentile (undocumented), so the surrogate cannot represent the extreme-load events the COU's reliability decision depends on — the low error is on a censored distribution

label_provenance.external_grounding: ASME V&V 40 data-processing documentation (D-CCB-11): undocumented, outcome-determining preprocessing (target clipping) is a defeater; a metric on censored data does not cover the censored regime.

by_field.gold_action.selected_class: provisional-self-adjudicated (row-builder; needs independent expert/solver adjudication before disposition-gate use)
